headline: Guy's 'I'm Just A Chill Guy' Instagram Bio Is Belied By His 47 Angry Comments On Local News Posts
summary: 'Why is the stoplight still red?' he raged. 'This is oppression.' The stoplight was green.
fullBody: Jake Chill has 'chill guy' in his bio. His comment history tells a different story. 'THE SCHOOL BOARD IS CORRUPT' he posted at 3 AM. 'WHO APPROVED THIS POTHOLE?' The pothole was a shadow. Jake has been banned from the town Facebook group. 'I'm very calm,' Jake said, typing angrily. His neighbors have started a 'Jake Watch.' He's now 'chill' on main, 'chaos' in the comments.
